## Description
## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Refactoring (Code improvement, optimizing OOP structure)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist:
- [ ] My code follows the PSR-12 coding standards.
- [ ] I have added `declare(strict_types=1);` to all new PHP files.
- [ ] I have used proper OOP principles (Interfaces, Enums, Services) instead of bloated Controllers.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas (e.g., Scoring algorithms).
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors.
